name: Meddling with a cursed boardgame
description:
you work for an antique dealer, when gathering things from an estate sale you notice a boardgame among the items being loaded up. it doesn't seem to have any paperwork attached so the auctioneer simply tells you to keep with a friendly wink. the next weekend you and your girlfriend Lily have a cookout with your best friends. you eat drink and have a good time, when Lily proposes you pull out that new game and try it out!

This is a body horror transformation story, while some scenes may be sexy and erotic it's supposed to be disturbing and unsettling so don't expect every play through to be a sexy fun romp. Do not play this if body horror and transformation bothers you. do not play this if possible NTR bothers you, Do not play this if moral degradation or loss of control (like berserker rage or unstoppable rutting urges) bothers you. do not play this if horror bothers you, do not play this if your squeamish and descriptions of bodily fluids bothers you, do not play if vore bothers you... i think i covered my bases but i probably missed something, basically just dont play this if your only into vanilla stuff. this is not vanilla. the kinks in the game are randomly implemented, but i did ask the LLM to give you things that were thematic to how you play, in my test playthroughs one of the characters Meghan started lying a lot and turned into a snake woman. in another playthrough one of the characters Bob tried to cheat so the boardgame shrunk his penis and gave him erectile dysfunction for cheating. my test playthroughs so far have worked mostly as i intended but the LLM can throw random curveballs, so either delete them and try to come up with a response that gives you an alternative or different scene or just roll with it and see where it goes. so far its pretty random but seems to function well. i had like 5 chats at 60 interactions+ each and only one of the playthroughs was really just wonky. in that playthrough it decided the same person was getting their turn over and over again... so poor rose got super duper transformed... the first person to travel 50 spaces is supposed to win some times it tracks the spaces properly other times it forget there is supposed to be a winner not sure how to fix that or if its even possible to fix.

preferred persona's would be nerdy folk that dont mind having a 22 year old nerdy shy girlfriend
creator: Mythosgeek
